HOME.SUMMARY: <location>London</location> based Design Engineer, hobbyist photographer and self-confessed tech nerd
HOME.BODY: In a nutshell, i’m a highly adaptable and passionate Design Engineer. I strive to produce beautiful products that inspire and delight. I’ve almost two decades of industry experience in both design and development. I’ve had the opportunity to work with great people, at some innovative companies for some industry leading brands.
